mapper.sql: select a.achievement_id, a.session_id, s.competition_id as competition_id, c.name as competition_name, a.category, a.name, a.team_name, p_view.contestant, ad_view.instructor, a.level, a.grade, a.track, a.certificate_no, a.group_id, a.award_time, a.year, a.owner_dep_id, a.is_reimburse, a.is_supplement, a.fee, a.reimbursement_fee, a.reimbursement_ratio, a.reimbursement_item_id, a.reimbursement_date, a.item_index, a.quality_index, a.submitted_at, a.reviewed_at, a.school_reviewed_at, a.review_result, a.schooi_review_result, a.review_reason, a.school_review_reason, a.audit_by, a.school_audit_by, a.create_by, a.update_by, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.del_flag, a.remark from sam_achievement a left join sam_competition_session s on a.session_id = s.session_id left join sam_competition c on s.competition_id = c.id left join ( select p.achievement_id, group_concat(concat(ifnull(s.name, '-'), '(', ifnull(p.student_id, '-'), ')') order by p.order_no separator '，') as contestant from sam_achievement_participant p left join sam_student s on p.student_id = s.no group by p.achievement_id ) p_view on p_view.achievement_id = a.achievement_id left join ( select ad.achievement_id, group_concat(concat(ifnull(t.teacher_name, '-'), '(', ifnull(ad.teacher_id, '-'), ')') order by ad.order_no separator '，') as instructor from sam_achievement_advisor ad left join sam_teacher t on ad.teacher_id = t.no group by ad.achievement_id ) ad_view on ad_view.achievement_id = a.achievement_id

select.select: select p.participant_id, p.achievement_id, p.student_id, s.name as student_name, s.school, p.order_no, p.manager, p.create_by, p.update_by, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.del_flag, p.remark from sam_achievement_participant p left join sam_student s on p.student_id = s.no where p.achievement_id = #{achievement_id}

select a.advisor_id, a.achievement_id, a.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, a.create_by, a.update_by, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.del_flag, a.remark from sam_achievement_advisor a left join sam_teacher t on a.teacher_id = t.no where a.achievement_id = #{achievement_id} select p.participant_id, p.achievement_id, p.student_id, s.name as student_name, p.order_no, p.manager, p.create_by, p.update_by, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.del_flag, p.remark from sam_achievement_participant p left join sam_student s on p.student_id = s.no where p.achievement_id = #{achievement_id}

select a.advisor_id, a.achievement_id, a.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, a.create_by, a.update_by, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.del_flag, a.remark from sam_achievement_advisor a left join sam_teacher t on a.teacher_id = t.no where a.achievement_id = #{achievement_id}
select.insert:
insert into sam_achievement
achievement_id, session_id, category, name, team_name, level, grade, track, certificate_no, group_id, award_time, year, owner_dep_id, is_reimburse, is_supplement, fee, reimbursement_fee, reimbursement_ratio, reimbursement_item_id, reimbursement_date, item_index, quality_index, submitted_at, reviewed_at, school_reviewed_at, review_result, schooi_review_result, review_reason, school_review_reason, audit_by, school_audit_by, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, del_flag, remark,
#{achievementId}, #{sessionId}, #{category}, #{name}, #{teamName}, #{level}, #{grade}, #{track}, #{certificateNo}, #{groupId}, #{awardTime}, #{year}, #{ownerDepId}, #{isReimburse}, #{isSupplement}, #{fee}, #{reimbursementFee}, #{reimbursementRatio}, #{reimbursementItemId}, #{reimbursementDate}, #{itemIndex}, #{qualityIndex}, #{submittedAt}, #{reviewedAt}, #{schoolReviewedAt}, #{reviewResult}, #{schooiReviewResult}, #{reviewReason}, #{schoolReviewReason}, #{auditBy}, #{schoolAuditBy}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{remark},
select.update:
update sam_achievement
session_id = #{sessionId}, category = #{category}, name = #{name}, team_name = #{teamName}, level = #{level}, grade = #{grade}, track = #{track}, certificate_no = #{certificateNo}, group_id = #{groupId}, award_time = #{awardTime}, year = #{year}, owner_dep_id = #{ownerDepId}, is_reimburse = #{isReimburse}, is_supplement = #{isSupplement}, fee = #{fee}, reimbursement_fee = #{reimbursementFee}, reimbursement_ratio = #{reimbursementRatio}, reimbursement_item_id = #{reimbursementItemId}, reimbursement_date = #{reimbursementDate}, item_index = #{itemIndex}, quality_index = #{qualityIndex}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt}, reviewed_at = null, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, school_reviewed_at = #{schoolReviewedAt}, review_result = #{reviewResult},
schooi_review_result = 0, school_reviewed_at = now(), school_review_reason = '因院级状态变更自动驳回', school_audit_by = 'system',
schooi_review_result = #{schooiReviewResult}, review_reason = null, review_reason = #{reviewReason}, school_review_reason = null, school_review_reason = #{schoolReviewReason}, audit_by = null, audit_by = #{auditBy}, school_audit_by = #{schoolAuditBy}, create_by = #{createBy}, update_by = #{updateBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, remark = #{remark},
where achievement_id = #{achievementId}
select.delete:
delete from sam_achievement where achievement_id in
#{achievementId}

delete from sam_achievement_participant where participant_id in
#{achievementId}
select.insert:
insert into sam_achievement_participant( participant_id, achievement_id, student_id, order_no, manager, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, del_flag, remark) values
( #{item.participantId}, #{item.achievementId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.manager}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.remark})
